rationale: The citing paper is a rejoinder that explicitly says it builds on the commentaries, including Berns (2005), to refine its placebo-effects framework and set a research agenda. Berns is not just listed in background; he is cited again where the authors discuss the need to uncover neurological mechanisms and note that Berns provides concrete ideas for such work. Although the citation is partly grouped with other commentaries, the text assigns a clear functional role to Berns in shaping conceptual interpretation and future research directions.
relation_description: The citing paper uses Berns (2005) as a substantive commentary input when refining its placebo framework and outlining neuroscience-based follow-up research. It draws on Berns specifically to motivate investigation of physiological and neurological mechanisms behind marketing placebo effects.
